name: tektonian-python
description: This npm package is for husky, commitlint, and elses related with repository managing. It's for developer only

scripts.test:release-pr: test -n "$GITHUB_TOKEN" || { echo "Error: GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable is required."; exit 1; }; release-please release-pr --token="$GITHUB_TOKEN" --dry-run --trace --repo-url=https://github.com/Tektonian/Simulac --target-branch=main --release-type=python
